prompt: A highly detailed, photorealistic 4K image capturing a modern smartphone mirror selfie with a social media aesthetic. The main subject is a beautiful American woman Dua Lipa with a slim build and a curvy lower body. She has long, voluminous black hair that casually frames her face. Her makeup is subtle, featuring lightly defined eyes and a soft reddish tint on her lips, and she wears a neutral, slightly focused expression. She is dressed in a solid red loose-fitting sleeveless crop tank top with thin straps and a deep side and cutout prominently visible and side revealing skin, worn loose and slightly lifted to reveal her waist, paired with high-waisted, form-fitting lavender shorts and long black socks pulled up her lower legs. She wears delicate gold rings on her left hand, along with a thin golden bracelet and a black hair tie on her left wrist. Her skin has a smooth, realistic texture with natural lighting highlights. She is leaning forward, comfortably resting her upper body, chest, and arms on the top edge of an inclined, padded black gym bench. The bench has a sturdy black metal frame and the brand name "Keor" visible on its side. Both of her hands are holding a smartphone with a pink case, raised near her face to capture the shot. Her lower body extends to the right, naturally displaying her side profile and hips. The setting is a well-lit but empty indoor commercial gym with high-key lighting. The background is slightly blurred with a natural depth of field, showcasing typical gym equipment such as metal squat racks, cable machines, mirrors, and visible red and black weight plates. The framing is medium to full-body from a slight side angle, capturing a casual, athletic, confident, and relaxed modern fitness mood.
